short_description: Critical security vulnerability in password manager
long_description: Password data is being stored in plain text and accessible through console. This affects all saved passwords in Firefox version 120.0. Steps to reproduce: 1. Save any password 2. Open developer console 3. Execute specific JavaScript command to access stored passwords. This is a severe security risk affecting all users.

short_description: Critical security vulnerability in password manager
long_description: Password data is being stored in plain text and accessible through console. This affects all saved passwords in Firefox version 120.0. Steps to reproduce: 1. Save any password 2. Open developer console 3. Execute specific JavaScript command to access stored passwords. This is a severe security risk affecting all users.

short_description: Email composition window freezes when attaching large files
long_description: When attempting to attach files larger than 25MB, the entire composition window becomes unresponsive. Mouse clicks are not registered, and typing is impossible. Only solution is to force-close Thunderbird. Reproducible on Windows 11 and macOS. Affects all attachments over 25MB regardless of file type

short_description: Incorrect icon rendering in dark mode
long_description: When using dark mode theme, some toolbar icons appear slightly blurry. This is purely cosmetic and doesn't affect functionality. Happens only with custom themes. Default theme icons render correctly. Issue is more noticeable on high-DPI displays.

short_description: Typo in developer documentation
long_description: Found a spelling error in the API documentation page. The word 'receiving' is spelled as 'recieving' in the WebSocket section. This is just a documentation issue and doesn't affect any functionality.

short_description: Browser crashes on startup
long_description: The browser crashes immediately when the user tries to open it after updating to version 110. This issue prevents access to bookmarks and settings.

short_description: Browser crashes on launch after update
long_description: After updating to Firefox 110, the browser immediately crashes on startup. Users cannot open the browser; all profiles are inaccessible. Reproducible on Windows 10 and Linux.

short_description: DevTools CPU profiler shows wrong metrics
long_description: CPU profiler reports abnormally high CPU usage numbers for simple workloads. This misleads developers diagnosing performance regressions but does not crash the application.

short_description: DevTools CPU profiler shows wrong metrics
long_description: CPU profiler reports abnormally high CPU usage numbers for simple workloads. This misleads developers diagnosing performance regressions but does not crash the application.

short_description: DevTools CPU profiler shows wrong metrics
long_description: CPU profiler reports abnormally high CPU usage numbers for simple workloads. This misleads developers diagnosing performance regressions but does not crash the application.

short_description: Email attachments failing intermittently
long_description: Attachments larger than 10MB sometimes fail to upload due to timeout errors when network is slow. Retrying usually succeeds.

short_description: Occasional TLS handshake error
long_description: Some builds report an intermittent TLS handshake failure when connecting to certain servers. Issue could not be reproduced in CI and happens rarely in the field.

short_description: Add-on icon misaligned in toolbar
long_description: The add-on icon appears slightly misaligned in the toolbar on small window widths. Cosmetic issue only and does not affect functionality.

short_description: Graphics driver crash during rendering
long_description: While rendering SVG images, the toolkit causes a driver crash on older NVIDIA GPUs. Users experience a complete system freeze. Requires immediate patch

short_description: Outdated API documentation on website
long_description: The documentation for the Sync API still references deprecated functions. Developers following the docs encounter runtime errors due to missing updates

short_description: Slow data sync for large datasets
long_description: Data synchronization takes several hours when transferring large JSON payloads. Performance degradation observed but service remains functional

long_description: This is a manual test to verify that predictions are logged in a single file without creating backups.

short_description: French translation missing in error popup
long_description: The French translation for one error popup is missing; it falls back to English. Users can still proceed, so impact is minimal
